summary: Implemented src/lib/{format,pagination,fx,pricing}.ts with colocated Vitest coverage; typecheck, lint, test, and build all green.
commits: 376ba8c feat(lib): add core utilities for format, pagination, fx, pricing
open_questions: Schema mission has not landed yet, so format.ts treats EUR amounts as decimal numbers. If schema picks integer cents, formatEur will need a divide-by-100 or a separate formatEurCents helper — flagged as a follow-up.
fx.ts defines its own FxRateRow shape because src/db/schema is empty. Once schema lands, the FxLookup row type should be replaced with a Drizzle-inferred type.
Tests colocated as src/lib/*.test.ts (not the SPEC §8 tests/ tree) — matches briefing option and avoids src/tests split. Existing tests/smoke.test.ts left untouched.
